topic_text: When Today's weather report from Weather Underground, do Voice announcement using Ubi. Every day at 07:00 AM, then voice announcement. Select time of day and UBI Device.

When Today's weather report from Weather Underground, do Voice announcement using Ubi. UBI announces the daily weather conditions.. The "Time of day" field is used to indicate when you want to hear the voice announcement of the daily weather forecast.Personalize the voice announcement field to include or exclude the information you want to hearIf you use Fahrenheit temperatures you can remove the Celsius reporting feature and if you use Celsius then remove the Fahrenheit temperatures.
When You enter an area from Location, do Voice announcement using Ubi. Ubi welcomes you home. When you get home, Ubi welcomes you!
When Today's weather report from Weather Underground, do Voice announcement using Ubi. Ubi Daily Weather. morning weather report, from your Ubi
When Switched on from WeMo Smart Plug, do Voice announcement using Ubi. Wemo Switch to Ubi Voice. Get notified when someone turns on that lamp, coffee pot or ironing station.
When Sleep mode enabled from UP by Jawbone, do Voice announcement using Ubi. Goodnight Ubi. Get a goodnight message from ubi
When Check engine light turned on from Automatic Classic, do Voice announcement using Ubi. Tell me my car's woes. Tell me my car's check engine/diagnostic info.

When Voice command from Ubi, do Voice announcement using Ubi. Testing the Ubi. If the user says to Ubi "test one" then the Ubi will reply back "Ubi triggered atTime regarding test one" or If the user says to Ubi "test 1" then the Ubi will reply back "Ubi triggered atTime regarding test 1"
When Nest set to Home from Nest Thermostat, do Voice announcement using Ubi. Welcome home- from your nest and ubi. Welcome home family!
When Nest set to Away from Nest Thermostat, do Voice announcement using Ubi. Nest away- good bye from ubi. Ubi says " have a nice trip"
When Tomorrow's weather report from Weather Underground, do Voice announcement using Ubi. Ubi Tomorrow's Weather. scheduled weather forecast from your Ubi
When Wind speed rises above from Weather Underground, do Voice announcement using Ubi. It's getting windy. Audible warning of crazy winds!!!
When Schedule override from ecobee, do Voice announcement using Ubi. Ubi says Schedule Changed. Ubi announces when someone changes the schedule on your Ecobee.

When New motion after quiet period from WeMo Motion, do Voice announcement using Ubi. Ubi announces Wemo Motion Alerts. Self explanatory really This is a simple Applet to get Ubi to announce when a Wemo motion sensor sees motion.

When You exit an area from Android Location, do Synthesize speech into conversation using Roger. Let someone know when you leave the office. Once you leave the selected area, people in the selected Roger conversation will receive a voice message that you left.
When Every year on from Date & Time, do Voice announcement using Ubi. Forgot your anniversary? Ubi didnt. Add your names into the voice announcement for that's special greetong
When Closed from SmartThings, do Voice announcement using Ubi. Announce when SmartThings contact closes. Announce when SmartThings contact closes
When Temperature rises above from SmartThings, do Voice announcement using Ubi. Get notified when a room is too hot. Get an ubi notification when your room is too hot.

When Moisture detected from SmartThings, do Voice announcement using Ubi. Tell the UBI water has been detected. Moisture sensor placed by the basement drain near fish tanks and hot water tank release valves

When Presence detected from SmartThings, do Voice announcement using Ubi. Welcome by Ubi. I want Ubi to welcome me when I arrive homeAfter creating this Applet, I can edit the entry at the Ubi control panel to add more announcements, like temperature, news, and etc.
When Tomorrow's low drops below from Weather Underground, do Voice announcement using Ubi. Ubi warns of chilly weather. Don't forget your mits.Ubi warns of tomorrow's chilly forcast
When Camera disarmed from Homeboy, do Voice announcement using Ubi. Alert Ubi users of Homeboy status. Announce when your Homeboy camera has been disarmed
When Every year on from Date & Time, do Voice announcement using Ubi. At least Ubi remembers... If only I could make Ubi actually sing it.
When Every year on from Date & Time, do Voice announcement using Ubi. If you forget your anniversary, ubi won't!. Happy annivetsary! From your amazing sidekick ubi!

When Any new event added from Google Calendar, do Voice announcement using Ubi. New calendar event. Share a Google account with your partner?  I doHave Ubi tell you whenever they have added an event you are probably going to be attending as well.
When Current condition changes to from Weather Underground, do Voice announcement using Ubi. let it snow,let it snow, let it snow. We always like to have a head's up if we need to shovel
When Tomorrow's weather report from Weather Underground, do Voice announcement using Ubi. Announce tomorrow's weather. 11pm announcement of tomorrow's weather

When Any event starts from Google Calendar, do Voice announcement using Ubi. Don't forget appointments and stuff,  Ubi's your valet!. This is pretty easy really,  Ubi can verbally berate you when you forget an appointment!

When Current UV index rises above from Weather Underground, do Voice announcement using Ubi. UV Index in your area. Know what is considered to be safe sun exposure in your areaA value above 6 is considered a high risk of sun damage
When Sunset from Weather Underground, do Voice announcement using Ubi. Sunset weather report. At Sunset, get the details of the day

When Sunset from Weather Underground, do Voice announcement using Ubi. UBI announces today's sunset.. We live in Cuenca, Ecuador and the whole top floor of our building is a patio for the residents and is the best place to watch the beautiful cloud formations at sunset.Customize the voice announcement field to include or exclude available information.The grayed areas contain the being pushed to the UBI.
When Today's weather report from Weather Underground, do Voice announcement using Ubi. Announce today's weather. 11am announcement of today's weather
When Today's weather report from Weather Underground, do Voice announcement using Ubi. Announce Weather Every Morning on Ubi. Announce the weather on the Ubi daily at a particular time of day.

When Today's weather report from Weather Underground, do Voice announcement using Ubi. Ubi, give me today's weather forecast each day at the same time.. Change the Voice Announcement field to have Ubi tell you what you want to hear.
When Current temperature drops below from Weather Underground, do Voice announcement using Ubi. Announce Below Freezing Temperature. Announces when the temperature drops below freezing

When Current UV index rises above from Weather Underground, do Voice announcement using Ubi. When to use sunblock or stay out of the sun to limit skin damage.. * Check to make sure the UV index information is available in your area.* Modify the Applet to report the temperature in either Fahrenheit or Celsius.

When Tomorrow's forecast calls for from Weather Underground, do Voice announcement using Ubi. UBI announces tomorrow's weather today.. Since we get more sunshine than rain this Applet only executes if it is going to rain but can be customized to execute on other weather conditions.Customize the voice announcement field to meet your needsThe grayed areas represent the values being pushed to UBI by the weather app.
When Today's weather report from Weather Underground, do Voice announcement using Ubi. Morning Weather Report. Have Ubi tell me the weather every morning
When Alarm turns on from Roost Smart Battery, do Voice announcement using Ubi. Voice announce smoke alarm. Allows Ubi to voice announce the smoke alarm from roost
When Tomorrow's high rises above from Weather Underground, do Voice announcement using Ubi. Put on your sun screen and bikinis- its hot!!!. Temp is gong to be hot tomorrow.Bikinis!

When Trip ended from Zubie, do Voice announcement using Ubi. Announce your arrival on your Ubi speaker. When a trip completes, this Applet will speaks the vehicle and address details on your Ubi speaker
When You enter an area from Location, do Voice announcement using Ubi. Welcome Home. When you get home, tell everyone that you're home.
